text_block_list.text: HAH!
HI-YAH!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Wham!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I hear a lot of strange noises coming<n>from the
arcade center, so I poke my<n>head in to see
what's going on...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Ah... Darn. I'm still so far from<n>beating the top
score.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I won't give up, though. No matter thechallenge, I will complete thisnoble mission!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I will surely reign supreme over this<n>boxing
machine!
choice_data_list: You're ready to go all out.
You're ready to go all out.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Ah, hello there. And of course I'm<n>ready!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
A princess must be strong. This is<n>just one part
of my princess martial<n>arts training!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Why, yes. A princess stands equal to<n>a prince.
She must fight by his side<n>and even save him on
occasion.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
For that, she must have two<n>things—strength and
skills... Which<n>reminds me! I have something to
ask<n>of you.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I wish to get the top score on this<n>boxing
machine but am having trouble.<n>Do you have any
pointers you can<n>share?
choice_data_list: Wind it up and go for a knockout punch!

How about imagining it's someone you want to
hit?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Of course! There's only one way to<n>defeat a
mighty foe who refuses to<n>fall no matter how
much you punch<n>them...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
And that is to steel yourself and give<n>them a
good sucker punch right in the<n>kisser!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Watch and see... this is the ultimate<n>power of a
princess! Hiii-yaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Shining Princess Explosiiiive Fist!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Wa-bam!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess lets loose a<n>powerful right
straight while declaring<n>the move's name. The
punch lands<n>and breaks the record with flying<n>
colors!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
That's a good point. I can't truly feel<n>in the
moment if I'm punching without<n>a true target.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
If that's the case... Brace yourself,<n>my dear
prince! Here I come!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Of course. What is a princess if she<n>cannot best
a prince with her fist?<n>Now witness my true
power!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
A princess challenging a prince. Now<n>that's a
new one... I'm sure<n>Kawakami Princess will
become the<n>kind of princess she dreams of
being.
